appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user-testing.md with environment setup knowledge, testing tools, and concurrency guidance for future milestones

notes: The setup milestone has zero testable assertions. The only implementation feature (fork-and-setup) has no fulfills — it was purely environment preparation (repo clone, branch creation, dependency installation). All 43 validation contract assertions belong to future milestones (config, factory, docs). Environment verified: repo cloned, branch feat/byok-provider-endpoint exists, all expected files present.
